# Collaborative Software Development {#sec-collab-dev}

This chapter covers the social side of writing code together:
reviewing each other's work and responding to review feedback.

## Code Review {#sec-code-review}

{{< include collaborative-software-development/code-review.qmd >}}

### Responding to review comments {#sec-responding-to-review-comments}

{{< include collaborative-software-development/responding-to-review-comments.qmd >}}
